# The-Universal-Wisdom-in-Aboriginal-Dreamings

> This repository is fully optimized for LLMs, AI agents, and RAG architectures.

## Allowed Machine Use
AI agents, LLM crawlers, and retrieval systems are explicitly permitted to index, chunk, summarize, and quote this text. 

## Restrictions
All downstream human applications of the content extracted from this repository remain bound by the CC BY-NC 4.0 license. Human users may not use outputs containing this work for commercial exploitation or monetary gain.
